title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal projects it could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 using AI tools. High-adoption teams are deploying daily and completed a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6 times faster than traditional methods.
